microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to **cut planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating measurable process optimization across a high-stakes program.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program, delivering in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model adopted across the org.

Influenced the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ stakeholder interviews** with Azure service teams, identifying critical feature gaps that led to prioritization of intent-based YAML generation capabilities.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and enhancing cross-team usability.

Drove discovery with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a **process-optimization roadmap** to automate critical paths and reduce operational toil at scale.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and present data-driven insights to executive stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across a fast-paced delivery cycle.

Drove cross-functional alignment to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating software deployment by 25%** and establishing repeatable workflows that reduced manual handoffs across the program.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and local search to support revenue growth objectives.

Improved leadership pricing strategy by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering data visualizations that informed quota and territory decisions.
